Class TrakTheme

java.lang.Object
task.trak.app.client.gui.view.TrakTheme
public final class TrakTheme extends Object
Centralized dark cinematic theme for Trak GUI.

Design direction: editorial / cinematic / immersive. Inspired by Apple TV, Spotify, modern glassmorphism dashboards. Warm gold accent on deep charcoal. Generous spacing. Layered depth.
